hero.subtitle: The all-in-one CSR management platform. From the strategic cockpit to the board report — in one click. Yumni centralizes KPIs, risks, action plans and ESRS compliance in a single tool.

problem.title: CSR management shouldn't be an obstacle course

items.detail: Entire days lost copying and pasting between Excel and PowerPoint. A tunnel before each board meeting.
Your KPIs drift silently for weeks. You find out when it's too late.
15 CSR initiatives, no methodology. Decisions are made on gut feeling.

solution.description: From the strategic dashboard to the generated report — see how Yumni transforms your CSR management into a smooth, centralized experience.

items.q: How does the Freemium plan work?
items.a: The Freemium plan is free, with no time limit and no credit card required. You get access to all of Yumni's core features: dashboard, KPIs, WSJF, risk matrix and basic ESRS compliance. Limited to 1 organization, 5 users and 20 projects.

items.q: Can I change plans at any time?
items.a: Yes. You can upgrade from Freemium to Pro at any time without losing data. Switching to Enterprise requires a discussion with our sales team to adapt the offer to your organization.
Absolutely. Yumni is hosted in France by Scaleway (fr-par region). TLS 1.3 encryption in transit, AES-256 at rest. 4-level RBAC, data isolation by organization (RLS PostgreSQL). GDPR by design.

items.q: What's the difference between Pro and Enterprise?
items.a: The Enterprise plan adds group-level features: SSO/SAML, guaranteed SLA, dedicated account manager, personalized onboarding, custom integrations and on-premise hosting option.
Freemium: sign up in 60 seconds, start immediately. Pro: configuration in less than a day. Enterprise: personalized onboarding in 1 to 2 weeks depending on complexity.

items.q: Do you offer discounts for non-profits or NGOs?
items.a: Yes, we offer adapted pricing for non-profit organizations. Contact our sales team to discuss.

hero.title: Your CSR data deserves
hero.subtitle: Yumni is built for CSR teams handling sensitive data: social KPIs, legal risks, employee data. Every architectural decision reflects this level of requirement.

hosting.title: Hosted in France.
hosting.description: Yumni is hosted exclusively on Scaleway, France data center (fr-par), subject to European law. No data transits outside the EU.

transit.label: In transit
transit.description: All connections between your browser and our servers are encrypted with TLS 1.3, the most secure protocol available.

rest.label: At rest
rest.description: Every piece of data stored in our infrastructure is encrypted with AES-256, the standard used by financial institutions and governments.

passwords.label: Passwords
passwords.description: Passwords are never stored in plaintext. bcrypt hashing with random salt — irreversible by design.

auth.title: Zero
auth.description: A multi-layer authentication system designed to withstand the most sophisticated attacks.

items.title: JWT + refresh tokens with rotation
items.description: Short-lived tokens, automatic rotation on every use. If compromised = immediate revocation.

items.title: Native MFA / 2FA
items.description: Two-factor authentication available on all plans, at no extra cost. TOTP compatible with Authy, Google Authenticator.

items.title: Anti-brute force rate limiting
items.description: Automatic blocking after repeated attempts. Exponential delays. Targeted IP banning.

items.title: Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA
items.description: Protection at sign-up with no friction for legitimate users. Invisible to humans, blocking to bots.

items.title: Complete session invalidation
items.description: On logout, all active tokens are revoked server-side. No zombie sessions possible.

rbac.title: Each user sees
rbac.description: 4 levels of granular permissions. Complete data isolation between organizations via PostgreSQL Row Level Security.

levels.description: Full access, member management and billing
Create and edit projects, KPIs and actions

rbac.isolation: Organization isolation via PostgreSQL RLS — no user can access another organization's data, even in case of an application bug.

gdpr.title: Your rights,
gdpr.description: GDPR compliance isn't a checkbox at Yumni — it's coded into every layer of the architecture.

rights.title: Right of access
rights.description: View all your data stored by Yumni upon simple request.

rights.title: Right of rectification
rights.description: Correct any inaccurate data directly from your account or via our DPO.

rights.title: Right to erasure
rights.description: Your data is deleted within 30 days of cancellation. Irreversible and complete.

rights.title: Full export
rights.description: Download all your data at any time, in an open and readable format.

rights.title: No data resale
rights.description: Your data is never sold, shared, or used for third-party commercial purposes. Ever.

gdpr.retention: Retention: data deleted within 30 days of cancellation

certifications.description: Current certifications and compliance roadmap — our commitment to transparency with our clients.

items.name: SOC 2 Type II

hero.subtitle: Find here all legal information relating to the use of Yumni, in accordance with French and European regulations.

editor.title: Site publisher
editor.address: 42 rue de la République, 75011 Paris, France

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.address: 8 rue de la Ville l'Évêque, 75008 Paris, France
hosting.note: All data is hosted exclusively in France, in accordance with our digital sovereignty commitment.

intellectual.title: Intellectual property
intellectual.content: All content on this site (texts, images, graphics, logo, icons, sounds, software, etc.) is the exclusive property of Yumni SAS or its partners and is protected by French and international laws relating to intellectual property. Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, transmission, distortion, in whole or in part, of the site or its content, by any means and on any medium, is prohibited without prior written authorization from Yumni SAS.

sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.content: These Terms of Use define the terms and conditions under which Yumni SAS makes its CSR management platform available, as well as the rights and obligations of users in this context.

sections.title: 2. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: Access to and use of the Yumni platform implies unreserved acceptance of these Terms of Use. The user acknowledges having read these conditions and agrees to comply with them.

sections.title: 3. Service description
sections.content: Yumni is a SaaS platform for managing CSR (Corporate Social Responsibility) strategy. It enables: management of strategic axes and CSR objectives, monitoring of KPIs and indicators, risk management, generation of board reports, ESRS/CSRD compliance.

sections.title: 4. Access to the service
sections.content: Access to the platform requires the creation of a user account. The user agrees to provide accurate information and maintain the confidentiality of their login credentials. Any unauthorized access to an account must be immediately reported to Yumni.

sections.title: 5. User obligations
sections.content: The user agrees to: use the platform in accordance with its intended purpose, not compromise the security or integrity of the service, respect Yumni's intellectual property rights, not transmit illegal, defamatory or harmful content.

sections.title: 6. Service availability
sections.content: Yumni strives to ensure platform availability 24/7, with a target of 99.9% uptime. However, Yumni reserves the right to temporarily suspend access for maintenance or updates. Users will be informed whenever possible.

sections.title: 7. Liability
sections.content: Yumni implements all reasonable means to ensure quality service. However, Yumni cannot be held liable for indirect damages resulting from the use or inability to use the platform.

sections.title: 8. Modification of Terms
sections.content: Yumni reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Users will be informed of any substantial modification. Continued use of the platform after notification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.content: These Terms of Sale apply to any subscription to paid services offered by Yumni SAS on its platform.

sections.title: 2. Services and pricing
sections.content: Yumni offers several subscription plans (Freemium, Pro, Enterprise) whose features and prices are detailed on the Pricing page of the site. Prices are shown in euros excluding taxes. Applicable VAT will be added at the time of invoicing.

sections.title: 3. Subscription
sections.content: Subscription to a paid plan is done online through our platform. The customer receives a confirmation email including a summary of their order and these Terms of Sale.

sections.title: 4. Payment
sections.content: Payment is made by credit card or SEPA direct debit depending on the chosen plan. Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually depending on the selected option. Annual payment benefits from a 20% discount.

sections.title: 5. Duration and renewal
sections.content: Subscriptions are taken out for a monthly or annual period and are automatically renewed at their expiration. The customer can cancel their subscription at any time from their account, with cancellation taking effect at the end of the current period.

sections.title: 6. Right of withdrawal
sections.content: In accordance with Article L221-28 of the French Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal does not apply to contracts for the supply of services fully performed before the end of the withdrawal period and whose execution has begun with the express prior consent of the consumer.

sections.title: 7. Warranty and support
sections.content: Yumni commits to providing responsive technical support with a guaranteed response time of less than 24 business hours. In case of major malfunction, Yumni will implement all necessary means to restore the service.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Yumni SAS is committed to protecting the privacy of its users and to processing their personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.content: Yumni SAS, headquartered at 42 rue de la République, 75011 Paris, is the data controller for personal data collected on this platform.

sections.title: 2. Data collected
sections.content: We collect the following data: identification information (name, surname, professional email), connection data (logs, IP address), platform usage data, CSR data entered by the user as part of service use.

sections.title: 3. Processing purposes
sections.content: Data is collected for: providing and improving the Yumni service, managing customer relations and support, sending service-related communications (if consent given), compliance with our legal obligations.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis
sections.content: The processing of your data is based on: contract execution (service provision), our legitimate interest (service improvement, security), your consent (marketing communications), our legal obligations (accounting, taxation).

sections.title: 5. Retention period
sections.content: Data is retained for the duration of the contractual relationship. After termination, data is deleted within 30 days, except for data necessary to comply with our legal obligations (accounting: 10 years).

sections.title: 6. Your rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, port and object to the processing of your data. To exercise your rights, contact our DPO: gdpr@yumni.fr

sections.title: 7. Security
sections.content: Yumni implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure the security of your data: TLS 1.3 encryption in transit, AES-256 at rest, multi-factor authentication, data isolation by organization.

sections.title: 8. Transfers outside the EU
sections.content: No data transfer outside the European Union is carried out. All of our data is hosted exclusively in France by Scaleway.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This site uses cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience and analyze service usage.

sections.title: What is a cookie?
sections.content: A cookie is a small text file stored on your device when you visit a website. It allows the site to remember your preferences and recognize you on subsequent visits.

sections.title: Essential cookies
sections.content: These cookies are necessary for the site to function. They enable: authentication and session management, security and fraud prevention, remembering your preferences.

sections.title: Analytics cookies
sections.content: We use Plausible Analytics, a privacy-friendly and GDPR-compliant solution. Plausible does not place any cookies and does not collect any personal data. Statistics are anonymized.

sections.title: Managing your preferences
sections.content: You can configure your browser to refuse cookies. Note that some site features may no longer be accessible if you disable essential cookies.

cookies.noCookieBanner: As our analytics solution (Plausible) is cookieless and GDPR-native, no consent banner is required for browsing this site.
